allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app import main; print\('import OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('camera_mode:', d['camera_mode']\); print\('live:', d['live']\); print\('today total:', d['today']['total']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('live:', d['live']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"inference:  {d['inference_ms']} ms\\"\); print\(f\\"camera:     {d['camera_mode']}\\"\); print\(f\\"live:       {d['live']}\\"\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('live:', d['live']\); print\('inference:', d['inference_ms'], 'ms'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"display_fps:  {d['display_fps']}\\"\); print\(f\\"inference_ms: {d['inference_ms']}\\"\); print\(f\\"camera_mode:  {d['camera_mode']}\\"\); print\(f\\"live:         {d['live']['category'] if d['live'] else None}\\"\)")
